churn.subtitle: Retention and follow-up

churn.noRecentActivity: No workouts or check-ins in tracked window
churn.detailEmptySub: Click a row to view details
churn.advancedDesc: A/B testing, attribution, and win-back history
churn.emailBodyPlaceholder: Hi {{name}}, we noticed you haven't visited in a while...
churn.emailSendFailed: Failed to send email. Please try again.
churn.showQrAtDesk: Show this QR code at the front desk
churn.tplMissYouBody:
We noticed you haven't been in for a while and we genuinely miss seeing you.

Whatever got in the way — busy schedule, motivation dip, or just life — we get it. But your progress matters, and we'd love to help you pick up where you left off.

Come back anytime, we're here for you.
churn.tplCheckInBody:
Just wanted to check in and see how things are going.

If anything is keeping you away — schedule issues, needing a new program, questions about your goals — let us know. We're happy to adjust things to make it work for you.

Hope to see you soon!
churn.tplNewClassesSubject: New things happening at the gym
churn.tplNewClassesBody:
We've been adding some exciting new classes and programs that we think you'd enjoy.

Whether you're looking to try something different or get back into a routine, there's something here for you.

Come check it out — your first class back is on us!
churn.messageHint: Member will receive this as an in-app notification.
churn.defaultMessage: Hey {{name}}, we noticed you haven't been in for a while. We miss you! Come back and let's get back on track together.
churn.winBackDefaultMsg: Hey {{name}}! We miss you at the gym. We'd love to have you back — come in this week and let's pick up where you left off. Your spot is waiting!

programs.title: Programs
programs.subtitle: Gym-branded workout programs for members
programs.noProgramsHint: Create structured programs for your members to follow

ppl.name: Push / Pull / Legs
ppl.desc: Classic 6-day split targeting all muscle groups twice per week. Best for intermediate lifters focused on hypertrophy.

upper_lower.name: Upper / Lower Split
upper_lower.desc: 4-day split alternating upper and lower body. Balances strength and hypertrophy. Great for beginners and intermediates.

full_body.name: Full Body 3×/Week
full_body.desc: Three full-body sessions per week. Ideal for beginners, time-crunched members, or anyone building a base.

strength_531.name: 5/3/1 Strength
strength_531.desc: Jim Wendler's proven powerlifting-style program built around the squat, bench, deadlift, and overhead press. 4 days/week.

bro_split.name: Classic Bro Split
bro_split.desc: One muscle group per day. High volume isolation work. 5 days/week. Popular for dedicated gym-goers focused on aesthetics.

starting_strength.name: Starting Strength
starting_strength.desc: Mark Rippetoe's beginner barbell program. 3 days/week, alternating A/B workouts. Focus on linear progression with squat, bench, deadlift, press.

powerbuilding.name: Powerbuilding
powerbuilding.desc: Hybrid strength + hypertrophy. Heavy compounds at low reps, then accessory work at higher reps. 4 days/week.

minimalist.name: Minimalist 2×/Week
minimalist.desc: For members who can only train twice per week. Two full-body sessions hitting all major groups with compound movements.

fat_loss_circuit.name: Fat Loss Circuit
fat_loss_circuit.desc: High-intensity circuit-style training with short rest. Full body every session, 3 days/week. Designed to burn calories and build endurance.

athletic_performance.name: Athletic Performance
athletic_performance.desc: Power, speed, and functional strength. Compound lifts + explosive movements. 4 days/week for athletes.

bodyweight.name: Bodyweight Only
bodyweight.desc: No equipment needed. Perfect for home workouts or traveling. 3 days/week, progressive bodyweight exercises.

dumbbell_only.name: Dumbbell Only
dumbbell_only.desc: Full program using only dumbbells. Great for home gyms with limited equipment. 4 days/week upper/lower split.

phul.name: PHUL (Power Hypertrophy Upper Lower)
phul.desc: Power Hypertrophy Upper Lower — 4-day split combining heavy strength work with high-volume hypertrophy sessions. For advanced lifters.

phat.name: PHAT (Power Hypertrophy Adaptive Training)
phat.desc: Layne Norton's 5-day program blending heavy power days with high-rep hypertrophy days. For experienced lifters seeking both strength and size.

advanced_ppl.name: Advanced PPL (High Volume)
advanced_ppl.desc: High-volume 6-day Push/Pull/Legs with A/B variants for maximum muscle growth. For advanced lifters who can handle high training volume.

strength_peaking.name: Strength Peaking
strength_peaking.desc: Competition-style peaking program focused on the big 4 lifts. High intensity, low accessories. 4 days/week, 6 weeks. For advanced powerlifters.

generate.configureHint: Configure your parameters and we'll generate a complete program using the real workout algorithm.

emailTemplates.bodyHint: Lines starting with - become bullets. Wrap text in --- for section headers.

prebuilt.welcomeSubtitle: We're thrilled to have you join the {{gn}} community.
prebuilt.welcomeBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

Welcome to the team. We built this app to help you train smarter, stay consistent, and celebrate every win along the way.

Here's what's waiting for you:
- Personalised workout tracking with progressive overload
- Challenges and leaderboards to keep you motivated
- Achievement badges and rewards for consistency

Your first workout is the hardest. After that, it's just momentum.
prebuilt.digestBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

Here's your week at {{gym_name}} at a glance:

--- This Week's Stats ---
🏋️ Workouts completed: {{workout_count}}
🔥 Current streak: {{streak_count}} days

--- Coming Up ---
Check the app for this week's class schedule and new challenges.

Consistency compounds. Every session you log is building something.
prebuilt.winbackSubtitle: It's been {{days_inactive}} days since your last session at {{gym_name}}.
prebuilt.winbackBody:
Hey {{member_name}},

Your {{streak_count}}-day streak is still on the books — waiting to be reignited.

We know life gets in the way. No guilt, no pressure. But your goals are still there, and so are we.

Sometimes all it takes is showing up once. Let's make it happen.
prebuilt.classReminderBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

Just a heads-up — your class is coming up soon.

--- Class Details ---
📋 Class: [Class Name]
👤 Instructor: [Instructor Name]
🕒 Time: [Class Time]
📍 Location: {{gym_name}}

Arrive a few minutes early to warm up. Don't forget to check in when you get there!
prebuilt.onboardingSubtitle: Everything you need to get the most out of {{gn}}.
prebuilt.onboardingBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

Welcome aboard. Here's a quick guide to get you started:

--- Track Your Workouts ---
- Log every set, rep, and weight — the app handles progressive overload for you
- Watch your estimated 1RM climb over time

--- Stay Accountable ---
- Check in at the gym to build your streak
- Join challenges and compete with other members

--- Earn Rewards ---
- Every workout earns you points toward real rewards
- Unlock achievement badges as you hit milestones

--- Connect ---
- Add friends, share PRs, and stay motivated together

The best time to start was yesterday. The second best time is right now.
prebuilt.milestoneBody:
Hey {{member_name}},

You just hit {{workout_count}} workouts at {{gym_name}}. That's not luck — that's dedication.

Most people never get this far. You did. And every single session has been building a stronger version of yourself.

Keep that momentum going. The next milestone is closer than you think.
prebuilt.challengeSubtitle: Starts this week. Are you in?
prebuilt.challengeBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

We're launching a brand new challenge at {{gym_name}}, and we want you on the leaderboard.

--- Challenge Details ---
🏆 Name: [Challenge Name]
📅 Dates: [Start Date] – [End Date]
🎯 Goal: [Challenge Goal]
🎁 Prizes: [Prize Details]

Challenges are where ordinary members become legends. Top performers earn rewards, badges, and serious bragging rights.

Spots are filling up. Don't miss out.
prebuilt.monthlyReportBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

Your monthly report for {{gym_name}} is ready. Here's how you performed:

--- Workouts ---
💪 Total sessions: {{workout_count}}
🔥 Longest streak: {{streak_count}} days

--- Personal Records ---
You crushed new PRs this month. Check the app for the full breakdown.

--- Attendance ---
Your check-in consistency was strong. Keep showing up — it's the single best predictor of results.

--- What's Next ---
Set a new goal for next month. Small targets lead to big transformations.
prebuilt.promoBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

As a valued member of {{gym_name}}, we have something special just for you.

--- The Offer ---
[Describe your offer here — discount, free sessions, merchandise, etc.]

⏳ Valid until: [Expiry Date]

This is our way of saying thank you for being part of the community. Don't let it expire.
prebuilt.referralBody:
Hey {{member_name}},

Great news — someone you referred just joined {{gym_name}}, and you've earned a reward.

Your generosity helps our community grow, and we don't take that for granted. Here's what you've unlocked:

🎁 [Reward Details]

Keep sharing your referral code — the more friends you bring, the more you earn.
prebuilt.reengagementBody:
Hey {{member_name}},

It's been a while since we've seen you at {{gym_name}}, and we just wanted to check in.

No sales pitch, no pressure. Life happens, and we get it.

But if you're ready to come back — even for just one session — we're here. Your data is saved, your progress is waiting, and the community would love to see you again.

Sometimes the hardest part is just walking through the door.
prebuilt.eventSubtitle: An event you won't want to miss.
prebuilt.eventBody:
Hi {{member_name}},

We're hosting something special at {{gym_name}}, and you're on the list.

--- Event Details ---
🎉 Event: [Event Name]
📅 Date: [Event Date]
🕒 Time: [Event Time]
📍 Location: [Event Location]

Whether you're a regular or haven't been in a while, this is a perfect reason to come through. Bring a friend — everyone's welcome.

Spaces are limited. Reserve yours now.

appTour.step1Text: This is your home screen. We pick the best workout for each day based on your schedule. Swipe the day strip to see upcoming days.
appTour.step2Text: Nutrition tracks your calories and macros. QR opens your check-in code to scan at the gym.
appTour.step3Text: Tap here to begin today's session. We'll suggest weights and reps based on your history — just follow along.
appTour.step4Text: Earn XP from workouts, PRs, and check-ins to level up. Complete the daily challenge for bonus points!
appTour.step5Text: All your workout routines and gym programs live here. Create custom routines or follow a structured program.
appTour.step6Text: The fastest way to begin. Shows today's workout with a big start button. Tap it when you're ready to train.
appTour.step7Text: Your workout history, body measurements, weight chart, and personal records — all in one place.
appTour.step8Text: See friends' activity, join gym challenges, and compete on leaderboards. Invite friends to earn bonus points!
appTour.step9Text: View your stats, achievements, goals, and gym info. Level up and unlock new achievement badges as you train.
appTour.step10Text: Hit this button anytime to start training. The app learns from every session to make your next one even better. Let's go!

coaching.title: AI Coaching Insights
coaching.plateau: Your {{exercise}} has stalled at {{weight}} lbs for {{weeks}} weeks. Try adding pause reps or switch variations for 2 weeks.
coaching.volumeUp: Volume is up {{pct}}% this week — great momentum! Keep pushing.
coaching.volumeDown: Volume dropped {{pct}}% this week — consider if you need a deload or if you're undertrained.
coaching.imbalance: You've trained {{highMuscle}} {{highCount}} times but {{lowMuscle}} only {{lowCount}} times in the last 4 weeks. Add more balance.
coaching.consistency: You hit {{completed}} of {{scheduled}} scheduled workouts this week — {{pct}}% adherence. Keep it up!
coaching.consistencyPerfect: Perfect week! You hit all {{completed}} scheduled workouts. Outstanding dedication.
coaching.prCelebration: New {{exercise}} PR: {{weight}} lbs! Keep that momentum going.
coaching.deload: You've been progressing for {{weeks}} straight weeks. Consider a deload week to optimize recovery.
coaching.streakChase: {{current}}-day streak! Your longest was {{longest}} — push for a new record.
coaching.streakRecord: {{current}}-day streak — you're on fire! Keep building.

bulk.messageHint: Each member will receive this as an in-app notification.
